lines.speaker: Episodes Orginally Transcribed by
lines.text: Eric Aasen, guineapig, Josh Hodge, Aaron D. Howard-Miller, and Kiza Abuzahra.
Monica and Chandler's, everyone except Phoebe is there as Rachel enters carrying a magazine.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So, I'm in my apartment doing the Soap Opera Digest crossword puzzle, and guess who the clue is for three down. (She hands the magazine to Joey.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (reading) Three down, Days Of Our Lives star blank Tribbiani. That's me!! I'm blank!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How cool is this?! We know three down! I'm touching three down! (She has her hand on his shoulder.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah you are baby.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Three down knows I'm married, what's three down doin'?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So did they call you to tell you your name's gonna be in this?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No. They really like me over there. They want to do a big profile on me, but I said no.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why'd you say no?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Remember what happened the last time I did an interview for them? I said I write a lot of my own lines, and then the writers got mad and made my character fall down the elevator shaft. So who knows what I might say this time.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: If only there was something in your head to control the things you say. (Joey nods his agreement.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, come on Joey! You will totally keep it in check this time, and plus y'know the publicity would be really good for your career! And you deserve that! And if you do the interview you can mention, oh I don't know, gal pal Rachel Green?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Is that gal pal spelled L-O-S-E-R?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, don't listen to him. Please?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Fine! All right, I'll do it. But hey! You guys have to be at the next table so you can stop me if I y'know, start to say something stupid.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Just then or-or all the time, 'cause we-we have jobs y'know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Come on! We will be there for you the whole time! Just remember gal pal Rachel Green. (Excited) Ha-ha! I'm gonna be in Soap Opera Digest! And not just in the dumb crossword puzzle. (Looks at Joey.) Seriously, proud of you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.
Opening Credits
Central Perk, Joey is there for his interview and everyone but Phoebe are hiding on the couch.

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: I really appreciate you taking the time to do this.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, not at all. Happy to do it.
[Cut to the rest of the gang sitting low on the couch and craning their necks to watch the interview.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Chandler) You think we're being obvious?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, we're just four people with neck problems. You talk like this. (Out of the sides of their mouths.)
[Cut to the interview.]

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: (To Joey) Y'know I think its great you wanted to meet here. Y'know when most people hear the magazine is paying for it they want to go to a big fancy restaurant.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (laughs) Actually, I didn't know the magazine was paying for it. Wouldn't have mattered, I'm doing this for the fans, not for the free food.

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: Can I get you anything?

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: Umm, I'll have a cup of coffee.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And I'll have all the muffins.
[Cut to the gang.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Shhh! We're not talking.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh. Finally! Oh. (Sits back in relief.)
[Cut to the interview.]

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: So, according to your bio, you've done quite a bit of work before Days of Our Lives. Anything you're particularly proud of?
[This starts a series of flashbacks; the first one is from Episode 106: The One With The Butt, Joey is in a play called Freud!.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (He goes into a song and dance number)
All you want is a dingle,
What you envy's a schwang,
A thing through which you can tinkle,
Or play with, or simply let hang...
[The next one is from Episode 304: The One With The Metaphorical Tunnel, Joey is on Amazing Discoveries.]

lines.speaker: Host
lines.text: Folks, has this ever happened to you. You go to the refrigerator to get a nice glass of milk, (Joey is in the background struggling to open a cartoon of milk) and these darn cartons are so flingin'-flangin' hard to open.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, you said it Mike. (Rips open the carton and spills milk on the counter) Aw! There's got to be a better way!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: And there is Kevin.
[Cut forward.]

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: This is the first time he's ever used this product, he's never used this product before, you're gonna see how easy this is to do. (To Kevin) Go ahead. ('Kevin' starts using the product, it is a spout that you jab into a paper milk carton so that you don't have to rip it open.) This works with any milk carton.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (finishing installing the Milk Master 2000) Wow, it is easy. (Starts to poor the milk) Now, I can have milk everyday.
The crowd ahhs.
[The next one is from Episode 322: The One With The Screamer, it's the end of Joey's play.]

lines.speaker: Lauren
lines.text: So this is it? Victor?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, I guess it is. And so... I'm gonna get on this spaceship, (Smoke starts pouring in from the ceiling, and a ladder comes down, with flashing, colored lights on the side of it) and I'm gonna go to Blargon 7 in search of alternative fuels. But when I return, 200 years from now, you'll be long gone. But I won't have aged at all. (Gets on the ladder) So you tell your great-great-granddaughter to look me up, because Adrienne... baby...I'm gonna want to meet her.
The ladder retracts, taking Joey up into the spaceship for his voyage to Blargon 7.
[The next one is from Episode 204: The One With Phoebe's Husband, when everyone including Julie is watching Joey in his porno.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Shh, OK, here I come, here I come. See I'm comin' to fix the copier, I can't get to the copier, I'm thinkin' what do I do, what do I do...so I just watch 'em have sex. And then I say, wait, here's my line, (Joey from TV) you know that's bad for the paper tray.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Nice work my friend.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thank you. Wait-wait-wait-wait, you see me again. Hang on, the guy's butt's blockin' me. There I am, there I am, there I am, there I am, there I am...
[Cut to the interview.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, there are so many things, it's hard to pick just one.
[Cut to the gang.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm gonna get some coffee, anyone want anything?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yeah, I'd actually love a blueberry muffin and a chamomile tea.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh, double latte, extra foam.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And a bagel with only...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (interrupting him) I was just being polite!
[Cut to the interview.]

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: Okay, how about when you're not working. What do you do in your spare time?
[This starts another series of flashbacks about Joey's hobbies. The first one is from Episode 703: The One With Phoebe's Cookies, Rachel is teaching Joey how to sail his boat, the Mr. Bowmont.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (drinking a beer) Look at this clown! Just because he's got a bigger boat he thinks he can take up the whole river. (Yelling) Get out of the way jackass! (To Rachel) Who names their boat Coast Guard anyway?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That is the Coast Guard.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What are they doing out here? The coast's all the way over there. (Points to the coast.)
[The next one is from Episode 603: The One With Ross's Denial, Joey is amazing Phoebe and Monica by holding his breath.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey! Check it out! This is unbelievable! Joey has been holding his breath for almost four minutes!
We see Joey who has puffed up his cheeks and Chandler nonchalantly reaches down and pinches Joey's nose shut. In a few seconds, Joey has to move because he's now forced to actually hold his breath.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Chandler) Dude! What are yo-you trying to kill me?!
[The next one is from Episode 507: The One Where Ross Moves In.]
Chandler and Joey's and Ross's, Chandler is entering and when he closes the door Joey pops his head out of the fort like before, but this time he's wearing a cowboy hat.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I see you've had a very productive day. Don't you think the cowboy hat is a little much?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (popping up behind Joey wearing an Indian headdress) Come on, it's fun!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right! (He joins them in the fort and comes up putting on a bonnet.) Isn't this a woman's hat?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Dude, stop talking crazy and make us some tea!
Chandler does so.

[The next one is from Episode 417: The One With The Free Porn, Chandler and Joey are lamenting the fact that every beautiful woman they see doesn't want to have sex right then and there like in porn.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know what, we have to turn off the porn.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I think you're right.
Goes over and picks up the remote.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, ready?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: One.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Two.

lines.speaker: Both
lines.text: Three.
Chandler turns off the porn and sets the remote down.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's kinda nice.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, that's kinda a relief.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.
Pause.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You wanna see if we still have it?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.
Chandler turns on the TV and...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: FREE PORN!!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We have free porn here!!!
[Cut to the interview.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: In my spare time I uh, read to the blind. And I'm also a mento for the kids.(The gang shake their heads.) Y'know a mento, a role model. (Chandler bites his fist to keep from talking.)

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: A mento...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: Like the candy?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Matter of fact, I do.
Chandler tries to jump over the couch but everyone stops him.

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: Well umm, another thing our readers always want to know is how our soap stars stay in such great shape. Do you have some kind of fitness regime?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh, we stars just try to eat right and get lots of exercise.
[Another set of flashbacks begin with Episode 521: The One With The Ball, Joey and Ross are throwing a ball around.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow! You realize that we've been throwing this ball, without dropping it, for like an hour?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Are you serious?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. I realized it about a half-hour ago but I didn't want to say anything 'cause I didn't want to jinx it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow! We are pretty good at this!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey! We totally forgot about lunch!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, I-I, I think that's the first time I ever missed a meal! (Checks his pants.) Yeah, my pants are a little loose!
[The next one is from Episode 604: The One Where Joey Loses His Insurance.]
Chandler and Joey's, Chandler enters to find Joey lying in the fetus position on the floor.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What's wrong with you?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Nothing! Well, I-I got this blinding pain in my stomach when I was lifting weights before, then I uh passed out and uh, haven't been able to stand up since. But um, I don't think it's anything serious.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: This sounds like a hernia. You have to-you-you-Go to the doctor!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No way! 'Kay look, if I have to go to the doctor for anything it's gonna be for this thing sticking out of my stomach! (Rolls over and shows Chandler.) Why did I have to start working out again? (Looks at the weights he was using.) Damn you 15s!
[The next one is from Episode 609: The One Where Ross Got High, Rachel is describing her desert to Joey and Ross.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It's a trifle. It's got all of these layers. First there's a layer of ladyfingers, then a layer of jam, then custard, which I made from scratch. [Joey and Ross make impressed faces] Then raspberries, more ladyfingers, then beef sauteed with peas and onions, [Joey and Ross look like something's wrong.] then a little more custard, and then bananas, and then I just put some whipped cream on top!
[Time lapse, Ross and Joey are eating Rachel's disaster.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It tastes like feet!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I like it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Are you kidding?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What's not to like? Custard? Good. Jam? Good. Meat? Goooooood.
[The next one is from Episode 619: The One With Joey's Fridge.]
Joey and Rachel's apartment, Chandler is entering to find Joey bingeing on the food from the fridge. Joey isn't doing all that well.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: The fridge broke. I have to eat everything. Cold cuts, ice cream, limes-Hey, what was in that brown jar?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's still in there?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Not anymore.
[The next one is from Episode 711: The One With All the Cheesecakes.]
The Hallway, Chandler and Rachel are on their knees with forks trying to salvage what they can of the cheesecake off of the floor.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! Yay! Look! There's a piece that doesn't have floor on it!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Stick to your side!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, come on now!
Joey finishes climbing the stairs and sees them. Chandler and Rachel both stop and look up at him. Joey sits down on the step.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (pulls out a fork) All right, what are we havin'? (Starts digging in.)
[Cut to the interview.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhh, I don't believe in these crazy diets y'know, just everything in moderation.

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: Your muffins. (Sets down a huge plate of muffins in front of Joey.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'll take those to go. (To the interviewer) For the kids.

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: Oh, I know what I wanted to ask you. You were on the show years ago and then they killed you off. What happened there?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It was so stupid, I said some stuff in an interview that I shouldn't have said. But believe me, that's not gonna happen today.

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: Understood. So, what'd you say back then?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I said that I... (The gang jumps up and interrupts him.)
Commercial Break
Central Perk, continued from earlier.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You guys, this is Shelley, she's interviewing me for Soap Opera Digest, and Shelley, this are my friends...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (interrupting him) Hi! I'm gal pal Rachel Green, and if you want the dirt, I'm the one you come too. This might be Joey's baby (rubbing her stomach), who knows? I'm just kidding-Seriously, (leans into the cassette recorder Shelley is using) gal pal Rachel Green.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (leaning into the recorder as well) Who just lost the respect of her unborn child.

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: Umm, I'm gonna just go get this warmed up. (She takes her coffee mug up to the counter.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey! You're doing great!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, so far nothing stupid.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Mento?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: (returning) So, as Joey's friends, is there anything that you guys think our readers ought to know?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh no, no just-just that he is a great guy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (scoffs at him) Yeah, that's gonna get you into Soap Opera Digest. Well I...(leans into the microphone again)...I would just like to say that Joey truly has enriched the days of our lives.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Umm, I...I just think you don't expect someone so hot to be so sweet.

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: Oh! I like that. What's your name?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Umm, Phoebe Buffay.

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: How do you spell that? So we can get it right.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh okay, it's P as in Phoebe, H as in hoebe, O as in oebe, E as in ebe, B as in bee-bee and E as in (In an Australian accent) 'Ello there mate!

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: Great! Well, it was nice meeting all of you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, you too.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You too!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Bye. (They resume their previous positions.)

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: So it seems like you have a lot of friends, who would you say is your best friend?

[They gang all lean back to listen better, and this starts another series of flashbacks. The first one is from Episode 214: The One With The Prom Video, Rachel has just found the bracelet that Joey gave Chandler, which is after he bought one to replace it.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How come you have two?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well this one's for you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Get out.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, I can't. No-no, listen, I, I know how much this means to you and I also know that this is about more than just jewelry, (Puts bracelet on Joey) it's about you and me and the fact that we're (Reading bracelet) best buds.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow, is this friendship? I think so. Check it out, we're bracelet buddies.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's what they'll call us.
[The next one is from Episode 618: The One Where Ross Dates A Student.]
Joey's apartment, Joey and Rachel are eating spaghetti in the living room while watching TV and Rachel drops some on the floor.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, Joey! Sorry!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No that's all right. Don't worry about it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh but look! That's gonna leave a stain!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Rach! Hey! It's fine! You're at Joey's!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! Look! (He throws some of his spaghetti on the floor.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I've never lived like this before.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know.
Rachel throws some of hers down.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, don't waste it, I mean its still food. (He picks it up and eats it.)
[The next one is from Episode 224: The One With Barry And Mindy's Wedding, Joey has to kiss a guy in an audition and has been trying to find one to practice with.]
Chandler and Joey's, Joey is reading a script as Ross enters

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right I've been feeling incredibly guilty about this, because I wanna be a good friend, and damnit I am a good friend. So just, just shut up and close your eyes (kisses Joey).

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow, you are a good friend, 'course the audition was this morning, and I didn't get it. But that was a hell of a kiss. Rachel is a very lucky girl.
[The next one is from Episode 512: The One With Chandler's Work Laugh, Joey and Phoebe are betting on who will reach the treat the fastest, the chick or the duck.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right. Let's get the contestants out of their isolation booths. (He removes the waste bucket that's over the duck and the laundry basket that's over the chicken.) And they're off! (He puts his foot in front of the chick, stopping it from moving.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Get your foot off my contestant! Judge!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Judge rules, no violation.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohhh.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And the duck gets the Nutter-Butter!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (turning from Ross.) No!! Hey-hey that's not a Nutter-Butter, that's just an old Wonton!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Judge rules, Nutter-Butter.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh, tough call.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.
[The next one is from Episode 401: The One With The Jellyfish, where Monica, Joey, and Chandler are relating that tragic day they spent on the beach.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'd seen this thing on The Discovery Channel...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wait a minute! I saw that! On The Discovery Channel, yeah! About jellyfish and how if you... (Stops suddenly and turns to look at Monica) Ewwww!! You peed on yourself?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe and Rachel
lines.text: Ewwww!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You can't say that!! You-you don't know!! I mean I thought I was gonna pass out from the pain! Anyway I-I tried, but I-I couldn't...bend that way. So... (Looks at Joey.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe, Ross, and Rachel
lines.text: (turning to look at Joey) Ewwww!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's right I stepped up! She's my friend and she needed help! And if I had too, I'd pee on anyone of you!
[Cut to the interview.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Umm, no. No best friend, no. Just a lot of close friends.

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: So umm, now back to the show. How does it feel to have a huge gay fan base?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Really? Me? Wow! I don't even know any huge gay people!
[Cut to the gang.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It hurts me. It physically hurts me.
[Cut to the interview.]

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: Now, off the record, you're not...
[Another group of flashbacks begin with Episode 513: The One With Joey's Bag. Joey is carrying the bag and has entered Central Perk to the amusement of Ross and Chandler.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What? Are you referring to my man's bag? At first, I thought it just looked good, but it's practical too. Check it out! It's got compartments for all your stuff! Your wallet! Your keys! Your address book!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Your make-up!
[The next one is from Episode 712: The One Where They're Up All Night, Joey and Ross are deciding how to climb down the final part of the fire escape.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay. Now-now-now should I climb down your front so we're face to face or-or should I climb down your back so we're-we're butt to face.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I think face to face.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I would say that.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Face to face, yeah!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, here I go.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right.
Ross steps onto the bottom rung of the ladder and then steps on Joey's chest.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (grunting) Oh my... How much do you weigh Ross?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I prefer not to answer that right now, I'm still carrying a little holiday weight.

Ross continues to climb down. He puts his other foot further down on Joey's torso, but that doesn't work very well and he's forced to wrap his legs around Joey. Which then forces Joey to get a nice and close view of Ross's crotch.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know, when we talked about face to face, I don't think we thought it all the way through.
[The next one is from Episode 722: The One With Chandler's Dad.]
Central Perk, Phoebe is sitting on the couch as Joey enters strutting.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey Pheebs! (He sits down next to her.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Check it out. (He turns around, pulls down his pants, and shows Phoebe that he's got panties on.) How much of a man am I?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wow! Nice! Manly and also kind of a slut.
[The next one is from Episode 608: The One With Ross's Teeth, Chandler is accusing Joey of becoming less of a man.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You're turning into a woman.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No I'm not. Why would you say that? That's just mean.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Now I've upset you? What did I say?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It's not what you said. It's the way you said it... Oh My God, I'm a woman!!!
[The next one is from Episode 706: The One With The Nap Partners.]
Joey and Rachel's, Joey and Ross are napping together again and both wake up at the same time.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Great nap.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It really was.
Suddenly Rachel clears her throat and the camera cuts to the rest of the gang staring at them. Needless to say Joey and Ross are shocked and slowly turn their heads to see the gang.
[Cut to the interview.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh me? Gay? No! No. No, but I have a number of close friends who are. (Chandler and Ross look at each other.)

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: So, let's talk about women. I'm sure our female readers will be interested to know about your romantic life.
[Another series of flashbacks begins with Episode 413: The One With Rachel's Crush, Joey is telling Rachel and Phoebe how he picks up women.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh-oh-oh-oh, how I do it is, I look a woman up and down and say, "Hey, how you doin'?"

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, please!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to Phoebe) Hey, how you doin'?
Phoebe looks at him, and then giggles and looks away.
[The next one is from Episode 605: The One With Joey's Porsche.]
The street, Joey is messing with a car cover and still wearing the Porsche stuff. This guy playing street football catches a pass next to the car cover Joey is fooling around with.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! How you doin'?

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: (to her friend) He has the most amazing Porsche under there!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'd love to show ya, but I just tucked her in. She's sleeping. (The women both laugh) Hey uh, would you two girls like to go for a drink? (Just then the same guy with the football dives to make a catch, lands on the car cover, and collapses it. It turns out that Joey set up a bunch of boxes to make it look like a Porsche.)
[The next one is from Episode 613: The One With Rachel's Sister, Chandler has just opened the door to reveal a woman standing there.]

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: Hi, is Rachel here? I'm her sister.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God, Jill!

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Oh my God, Rachel!
They run and hug each other.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh my God, introduce us!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: This is Chandler. (Points at him.)

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And you know Monica and Ross!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi Jill.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And that's Phoebe (points), and that's Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, (in the Joey voice) how you doin'?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Don't!! (Joey backs away frightened.)
[The final one is from Episode 607: The One Where Phoebe Runs, Joey has been trying to repel Janice and sees it's not working to his liking so he's confronting her about the sexual tension.]

lines.speaker: Janine
lines.text: No! I mean you're a really nice guy and I'm happy to be your roommate and your friend, I'm just y'know, I just don't feel that way about you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh! I see what happened. It's because I was trying to repel you. Right? Believe me, you'd feel a lot different if I turned it on.

lines.speaker: Janine
lines.text: I don't think so.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, I do. (Gives her the Joey-love look.) How you doin?

lines.speaker: Janine
lines.text: I'm okay.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?!?! Oh dear God!
[Cut to the interview.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Not much to tell there I'm really shy.
The gang is confused.

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: So, that's it. I guess that's all I need. Thank you so much. I think they will be running this in the beginning of next month.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh great! Great! Thank you. (They shake hands.)

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: Bye.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Bye-bye. (The interviewer leaves and he sits down with the rest of the gang.) I did it!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Amazing! Amazing!

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: (returning) Oh wait! I almost forgot. We have to ask everybody this. Other than Days of Our Lives, what's your favorite soap opera?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, I don't watch soap operas. Excuse me, I have a life, y'know?
The gang is disappointed.

lines.speaker: The Interviewer
lines.text: Thank you. The readers at Soap Opera Digest will be happy to hear that.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, good to know. (The interviewer leaves.) So close!
Closing Credits
Monica and Chandler's, everyone is reading Joey's interview.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! I can't believe they didn't put it in the part where you said you didn't watch soap operas.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, I called the lady about that. I told her I was just joking. She was pretty nice about that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You slept with her didn't you?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Little bit, yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow! This picture of you sure is steamy.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah, that's just a little something for my huge gay fan base. (Winks at him.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Did you just wink at me?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, you're the one that loves the picture.
End
